data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: RED confirmed ✓ — all 3 test functions fail on current codebase: test_claude_md_has_plugin_boundary_rule (FAIL: no plugin boundary rule in CLAUDE.md), test_cascade_replan_at_skill_path (FAIL: file at docs/designs/ not skills/sprint/docs/), test_no_dev_artifact_paths_in_plugin_agents_skills (FAIL: 14 matches found in agents/skills)
